description: Kiwi.com is a travel-booking company focused on flights and related travel products. It also operates a B2B partner platform called Tequila for selected business partners.
summary: Kiwi.com exposes a partner-facing Tequila HTTP API with publicly visible landing/login pages but no public auth mechanics or machine-readable spec, plus a known MCP server at https://mcp.kiwi.com whose auth requirements are not publicly documented.
